---
title: "Project"
---

::: {.media-grid .projects-grid}

::: {.media-card}
![](static/media/images/projects-page-2026-02-21.png){fig-alt="Satellite imagery over city"}

### IMAGO

<span class="meta">Making satellite imagery useful, usable and used across social research and policy.</span>

[Project website](https://imago.ac.uk)
:::
